title: TitanPRO™ Plastic TV Dinner Table
features: Take a break from the hustle and bustle of event season or set up a personable work station on the go, our TV TableTitanPRO™ Plastic TV Dinner Table is one dynamic piece of furniture - and we didn't even mention the adjustable heights.
With optional heights of 18.5", 25" or 29", the usage possibilities are endless.

The adjustable height dining option will certainly hold up under duress, from the rythmic banging of the keyboard, frustrations over a 1000 piece puzzle or a place for the little ones to engage in arts and crafts or homework.

Speaking of homework, this can serve as a great alternative to desks for schools looking to create more space in the classroom This commercial-grade dinner table seamlessly folds up when not in use and takes up virtually no storage space in your closet.
In the event that you get some gravy and mashed potatoes on the surface, even the messiest of messes can easily be wiped clean using water and a paper towel, causing no damage to the tabletop.
This is truly a one of a kind all purpose utility table!
